title: Undertale Souls Mod
description: The mod adds the souls of children from Undertale, both original and fan favorites
body:
Discover the Power of the SOULs — Undertale-Inspired Mod!

This modification brings the legendary SOULs from Undertale into your Minecraft world, each granting you unique abilities inspired by the original game.

💠 What’s Inside?

    A variety of SOULs, each based on a different emotion or trait — just like in Undertale.

    Special abilities unlocked by equipping SOULs in your inventory.

    A custom injection crafting system, allowing you to create SOULs using special ingredients at the Workbench.

    Advancements to track your progress and reward your discoveries.

🧪 To use a SOUL, first craft its injection, then activate it to experience powerful effects and abilities. Each SOUL has its own personality and gameplay style — explore them all!
